description: Composition Blue strappy dotted dress made of 100% cotton, has two pockets on the sides with a satin bow detail, full buttoned placket with flower shaped buttons, pin-tucks from the chest to the hem and a ruffled hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours in a gentle cycle Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry low or lay flat to dry Medium heat steam iron do not iron on decorations Do not dry in sunlight Catching butterflies in summer - that's what this frock from doodle is perfect for! Crafted with pure absorbent cotton (for her comfort), pretty ruffling at the hem and too-sweet flower shaped buttons, this piece is perfect for a spring fete or an evening stroll in the park.
